notes: Main is orchestrator-only and must not perform Builder/Reviewer/Auditor/Supervisor implementation work.
Role bindings are execution bindings, not status labels.
A role may be marked ACTIVE only if its bound session exists, the locked model matches, and work has been dispatched to that session.
Reviewer, Auditor, and Supervisor model assignments are locked by project documentation unless Commander explicitly changes them.
Builder model is carried from the current project definition until a separate builder lock file is introduced.
